sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76109" key="o)fqalmi=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀφθαλμ-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, epith. of Athena as <sense id="n76109.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goddess of the Moon</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:18:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.18.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
